creator: quentin.thebault@defenso.fr
text:
Thank you for your interest.

I have not had time to check with linux yet.

I tried with the MINIMAL kernel but it doesn't load my ZFS fs so I need more time but can do it if you can confirm the output would actually be worth it.

The last idea gave an interesting result: I tried to remove amdgpu and disable devmatch and with these settings, `poweroff` still does not properly shuts down the machine, but reboots it, which is a change!
